S STRING
C ["SET", "s:k", "v"] -> "+OK"
C ["GET", "s:k"] -> "$v"
C ["GET", "s:missing"] -> "$-1"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v2", "XX"] -> "+OK"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v3", "NX"] -> "$-1"
C ["GET", "s:k"] -> "$v2"
C ["SET", "s:new", "v", "NX"] -> "+OK"
C ["SET", "s:missing2", "v", "XX"] -> "$-1"
C ["GET", "s:missing2"] -> "$-1"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v4", "GET"] -> "$v2"
C ["SET", "s:g", "v", "GET"] -> "$-1"
C ["GET", "s:g"] -> "$v"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v", "EX", "100"] -> "+OK"
C ["TTL", "s:k"] -> ":100"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v5", "KEEPTTL"] -> "+OK"
C ["TTL", "s:k"] -> ":100"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v6"] -> "+OK"
C ["TTL", "s:k"] -> ":-1"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v", "PX", "100000"] -> "+OK"
C ["TTL", "s:k"] -> ":100"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v", "EXAT", "9999999999"] -> "+OK"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v", "PXAT", "9999999999000"] -> "+OK"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v", "EX", "0"] -> "-ERR invalid expire time in 'set' command"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v", "EX", "notanum"] -> "-ERR value is not an integer or out of range"
C ["SET", "s:k", "v", "BOGUS"] -> "-ERR syntax error"
C ["SET", "s:k"] -> "-ERR wrong number of arguments for 'set' command"
C ["SETNX", "s:nx", "v"] -> ":1"
C ["SETNX", "s:nx", "w"] -> ":0"
C ["GET", "s:nx"] -> "$v"
C ["SETEX", "s:se", "100", "v"] -> "+OK"
C ["TTL", "s:se"] -> ":100"
C ["SETEX", "s:se", "0", "v"] -> "-ERR invalid expire time in 'setex' command"
C ["PSETEX", "s:pse", "100000", "v"] -> "+OK"
C ["TTL", "s:pse"] -> ":100"
C ["PSETEX", "s:pse", "0", "v"] -> "-ERR invalid expire time in 'psetex' command"
C ["GETDEL", "s:nx"] -> "$v"
C ["GET", "s:nx"] -> "$-1"
C ["GETDEL", "s:missing"] -> "$-1"
C ["GETEX", "s:se"] -> "$v"
C ["TTL", "s:se"] -> ":100"
C ["GETEX", "s:se", "PERSIST"] -> "$v"
C ["TTL", "s:se"] -> ":-1"
C ["GETEX", "s:se", "EX", "50"] -> "$v"
C ["TTL", "s:se"] -> ":50"
C ["GETEX", "s:se", "EX", "0"] -> "-ERR invalid expire time in 'getex' command"
C ["GETEX", "s:se", "BOGUS"] -> "-ERR syntax error"
C ["GETEX", "s:missing"] -> "$-1"
C ["STRLEN", "s:k"] -> ":1"
C ["STRLEN", "s:missing"] -> ":0"
C ["SET", "s:r", "Hello World"] -> "+OK"
C ["GETRANGE", "s:r", "0", "4"] -> "$Hello"
C ["GETRANGE", "s:r", "-5", "-1"] -> "$World"
C ["GETRANGE", "s:r", "0", "-1"] -> "$Hello World"
C ["GETRANGE", "s:r", "6", "3"] -> "$"
C ["GETRANGE", "s:r", "50", "100"] -> "$"
C ["GETRANGE", "s:r", "-100", "-50"] -> "$H"
C ["GETRANGE", "s:missing", "0", "-1"] -> "$"
C ["GETRANGE", "s:r", "x", "1"] -> "-ERR value is not an integer or out of range"
C ["SUBSTR", "s:r", "0", "4"] -> "$Hello"
C ["APPEND", "s:app", "abc"] -> ":3"
C ["APPEND", "s:app", "def"] -> ":6"
C ["GET", "s:app"] -> "$abcdef"
C ["SETRANGE", "s:sr", "5", "hello"] -> ":10"
C ["GET", "s:sr"] -> "$\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000hello"
C ["SETRANGE", "s:sr", "0", "XY"] -> ":10"
C ["GET", "s:sr"] -> "$XY\u0000\u0000\u0000hello"
C ["SETRANGE", "s:empty", "0", ""] -> ":0"
C ["GET", "s:empty"] -> "$-1"
C ["SETRANGE", "s:sr", "-1", "x"] -> "-ERR offset is out of range"
C ["SETRANGE", "s:big", "536870911", "xx"] -> "-ERR string exceeds maximum allowed size (proto-max-bulk-len)"
C ["INCR", "s:ctr"] -> ":1"
C ["INCRBY", "s:ctr", "41"] -> ":42"
C ["DECR", "s:ctr"] -> ":41"
C ["DECRBY", "s:ctr", "40"] -> ":1"
C ["SET", "s:ctr2", "9223372036854775807"] -> "+OK"
C ["INCR", "s:ctr2"] -> "-ERR increment or decrement would overflow"
C ["DECRBY", "s:ctr2", "-1"] -> "-ERR increment or decrement would overflow"
C ["SET", "s:ctr3", "notanint"] -> "+OK"
C ["INCR", "s:ctr3"] -> "-ERR value is not an integer or out of range"
C ["SET", "s:ctr4", " 11"] -> "+OK"
C ["INCR", "s:ctr4"] -> "-ERR value is not an integer or out of range"
C ["SET", "s:ctr5", "011"] -> "+OK"
C ["INCR", "s:ctr5"] -> "-ERR value is not an integer or out of range"
C ["INCRBY", "s:ctr", "x"] -> "-ERR value is not an integer or out of range"
C ["INCRBYFLOAT", "s:f", "10.5"] -> "$10.5"
C ["INCRBYFLOAT", "s:f", "0.25"] -> "$10.75"
C ["INCRBYFLOAT", "s:f", "-5"] -> "$5.75"
C ["GET", "s:f"] -> "$5.75"
C ["SET", "s:f2", "5.0e3"] -> "+OK"
C ["INCRBYFLOAT", "s:f2", "200"] -> "$5200"
C ["INCRBYFLOAT", "s:f2", "x"] -> "-ERR value is not a valid float"
C ["SET", "s:f3", "abc"] -> "+OK"
C ["INCRBYFLOAT", "s:f3", "1"] -> "-ERR value is not a valid float"
C ["MSET", "s:m1", "a", "s:m2", "b"] -> "+OK"
C ["MGET", "s:m1", "s:m2", "s:missing"] -> ["$a", "$b", "$-1"]
C ["MSET", "s:m1"] -> "-ERR wrong number of arguments for 'mset' command"
C ["MSET", "s:m1", "a", "s:m2"] -> "-ERR wrong number of arguments for 'mset' command"
C ["MSETNX", "s:n1", "a", "s:n2", "b"] -> ":1"
C ["MSETNX", "s:n2", "c", "s:n3", "d"] -> ":0"
C ["MGET", "s:n1", "s:n2", "s:n3"] -> ["$a", "$b", "$-1"]
C ["OBJECT", "ENCODING", "s:ctr"] -> "$int"
C ["SET", "s:emb", "short"] -> "+OK"
C ["OBJECT", "ENCODING", "s:emb"] -> "$embstr"
C ["SET", "s:emb44", "xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"] -> "+OK"
C ["OBJECT", "ENCODING", "s:emb44"] -> "$embstr"
C ["SET", "s:emb45", "xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"] -> "+OK"
C ["OBJECT", "ENCODING", "s:emb45"] -> "$raw"
C ["SET", "s:negz", "-0"] -> "+OK"
C ["OBJECT", "ENCODING", "s:negz"] -> "$embstr"
C ["OBJECT", "ENCODING", "s:missing"] -> "$-1"
C ["TYPE", "s:k"] -> "+string"
C ["TYPE", "s:missing"] -> "+none"
C ["SET", "s:lcs1", "ohmytext"] -> "+OK"
C ["SET", "s:lcs2", "mynewtext"] -> "+OK"
C ["LCS", "s:lcs1", "s:lcs2"] -> "$mytext"
C ["LCS", "s:lcs1", "s:lcs2", "LEN"] -> ":6"
C ["LCS", "s:lcs1", "s:lcs2", "IDX", "MINMATCHLEN", "4", "WITHMATCHLEN"] -> ["$matches", [[[":4", ":7"], [":5", ":8"], ":4"]], "$len", ":6"]
S BITMAP
C ["SETBIT", "b:k", "7", "1"] -> ":0"
C ["GETBIT", "b:k", "7"] -> ":1"
C ["GETBIT", "b:k", "100"] -> ":0"
C ["SETBIT", "b:k", "7", "0"] -> ":1"
C ["SETBIT", "b:k", "7", "2"] -> "-ERR bit is not an integer or out of range"
C ["SETBIT", "b:k", "-1", "1"] -> "-ERR bit offset is not an integer or out of range"
C ["SETBIT", "b:k", "4294967296", "1"] -> "-ERR bit offset is not an integer or out of range"
C ["GETBIT", "b:missing", "0"] -> ":0"
C ["SET", "b:s", "foobar"] -> "+OK"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s"] -> ":26"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s", "0", "0"] -> ":4"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s", "1", "1"] -> ":6"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s", "0", "-5"] -> ":10"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s", "0", "-50"] -> ":4"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s", "0", "5", "BYTE"] -> ":26"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s", "5", "30", "BIT"] -> ":17"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:missing"] -> ":0"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s", "0"] -> "-ERR syntax error"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s", "0", "1", "BOGUS"] -> "-ERR syntax error"
C ["BITCOUNT", "b:s", "x", "1"] -> "-ERR value is not an integer or out of range"
C ["BITPOS", "b:s", "1"] -> ":1"
C ["BITPOS", "b:s", "1", "0", "-50"] -> ":1"
C ["SET", "b:z", "\u0000\u00ff\u00f0"] -> "+OK"
C ["BITPOS", "b:z", "1", "0"] -> ":8"
C ["BITPOS", "b:z", "1", "2"] -> ":16"
C ["BITPOS", "b:z", "1", "0", "-1", "BIT"] -> ":8"
C ["SET", "b:ones", "\u00ff\u00ff\u00ff"] -> "+OK"
C ["BITPOS", "b:ones", "0"] -> ":24"
C ["BITPOS", "b:ones", "0", "0", "-1"] -> ":-1"
C ["BITPOS", "b:ones", "0", "0", "-1", "BIT"] -> ":-1"
C ["BITPOS", "b:missing", "1"] -> ":-1"
C ["BITPOS", "b:missing", "0"] -> ":0"
C ["BITPOS", "b:s", "2"] -> "-ERR The bit argument must be 1 or 0."
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:k", "SET", "u8", "0", "255", "GET", "u8", "0"] -> [":0", ":255"]
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:k", "INCRBY", "u8", "0", "10"] -> [":9"]
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:k", "OVERFLOW", "SAT", "INCRBY", "u8", "0", "250"] -> [":255"]
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:k", "OVERFLOW", "FAIL", "INCRBY", "u8", "0", "10"] -> ["$-1"]
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:k", "GET", "i8", "0"] -> [":-1"]
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:k", "GET", "u8", "#1"] -> [":0"]
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:k", "SET", "u64", "0", "1"] -> "-ERR Invalid bitfield type. Use something like i16 u8. Note that u64 is not supported but i64 is."
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:k", "SET", "u8", "0"] -> "-ERR syntax error"
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:k", "OVERFLOW", "BOGUS", "GET", "u8", "0"] -> "-ERR Invalid OVERFLOW type specified"
C ["BITFIELD", "bf:missing", "GET", "u16", "0"] -> [":0"]
C ["BITFIELD_RO", "bf:k", "GET", "u8", "0"] -> [":255"]
C ["BITFIELD_RO", "bf:k", "SET", "u8", "0", "1"] -> "-ERR BITFIELD_RO only supports the GET subcommand"
C ["SET", "b:x", "abc"] -> "+OK"
C ["SET", "b:y", "abd"] -> "+OK"
C ["BITOP", "AND", "b:dand", "b:x", "b:y"] -> ":3"
C ["GET", "b:dand"] -> "$ab`"
C ["BITOP", "OR", "b:dor", "b:x", "b:y"] -> ":3"
C ["GET", "b:dor"] -> "$abg"
C ["BITOP", "XOR", "b:dx", "b:x", "b:y"] -> ":3"
C ["GET", "b:dx"] -> "$\u0000\u0000\u0007"
C ["BITOP", "NOT", "b:dn", "b:x"] -> ":3"
C ["GET", "b:dn"] -> "$\u009e\u009d\u009c"
C ["BITOP", "NOT", "b:dn", "b:x", "b:y"] -> "-ERR BITOP NOT must be called with a single source key."
C ["BITOP", "BOGUS", "b:d", "b:x"] -> "-ERR syntax error"
C ["BITOP", "XOR", "b:dz", "b:missing1", "b:missing2"] -> ":0"
C ["GET", "b:dz"] -> "$-1"
C ["SET", "b:short", "ab"] -> "+OK"
C ["BITOP", "XOR", "b:dxl", "b:x", "b:short"] -> ":3"
C ["GET", "b:dxl"] -> "$\u0000\u0000c"
S HLL
C ["PFADD", "h:a", "x", "y", "z"] -> ":1"
C ["PFCOUNT", "h:a"] -> ":3"
C ["PFADD", "h:b", "y", "z", "w"] -> ":1"
C ["PFMERGE", "h:m", "h:a", "h:b"] -> "+OK"
C ["PFCOUNT", "h:m"] -> ":4"
C ["PFCOUNT", "h:a", "h:b"] -> ":4"
C ["SET", "h:plain", "x"] -> "+OK"
C ["PFCOUNT", "h:plain"] -> "-WRONGTYPE Key is not a valid HyperLogLog string value."
C ["PFADD", "h:plain", "x"] -> "-WRONGTYPE Key is not a valid HyperLogLog string value."
C ["PFDEBUG", "ENCODING", "h:a"] -> "+sparse"
C ["TYPE", "h:a"] -> "+string"
